C

Canvas - Class in Unnamed Package
Canvas is a class to allow for simple graphical drawing on a canvas.
changeColor(String) - Method in class Cup
Change the cup's color
changeColor(String) - Method in class Lid
Change the lid's color
changeColor(String) - Method in class Rectangle
Change the color.
changeSize(int, int) - Method in class Rectangle
Change the size to the new size

makeInvisible() - Method in class Cup
Make the cup invisible
makeInvisible() - Method in class Lid
Make the lid invisible

Make this rectangle invisible.

name: makeInvisible use nothing Hace invisible el simulador y oculta todos los elementos returns nothing

Make the cup visible
makeVisible() - Method in class Lid
Make the lid visible
makeVisible() - Method in class Rectangle
Make this rectangle visible.

name: makeVisible use nothing Hace visible el simulador.
moveDown() - Method in class Rectangle
Move the rectangle a few pixels down.
moveHorizontal(int) - Method in class Rectangle
Move the rectangle horizontally.
moveLeft() - Method in class Rectangle
Move the rectangle a few pixels to the left.
moveRight() - Method in class Rectangle
Move the rectangle a few pixels to the right.
moveUp() - Method in class Rectangle
Move the rectangle a few pixels up.
moveVertical(int) - Method in class Rectangle
Move the rectangle vertically.

O

orderTower() - Method in class Tower
name: orderTower use nothing Order tower from largest to smallest (mayor a menor) returns nothing

P

popCup() - Method in class Tower
name: popCup use nothing removes the last cup on cups and items lists returns nothign
popLid() - Method in class Tower
name: popLid use nothing Removes the last lid on lids and items lists returns nothing
pushCup(int) - Method in class Tower
name: pushCup use int : i (given cup identifier) adds a "cup" on the items list (with type "cup" and real size) and cups list (only size) returns nothing
pushLid(int) - Method in class Tower
pushLid genera una tapa del tamaño correspondiente a una copa.

R

Rectangle - Class in Unnamed Package
A rectangle that can be manipulated and that draws itself on a canvas.
Rectangle() - Constructor for class Rectangle
Create a new rectangle at default position with default color.
Rectangle(int, int, int, int, String) - Constructor for class Rectangle
Create a rectangle with specific dimensions
removeCup(int) - Method in class Tower
name: removeCup use int : i (given cup identifier to remove) removes the cup with given "id" returns nothing
removeLid(int) - Method in class Tower
name: removeLid use int : i (given lid identifier to remove) removes the specific lid on lids and items lists returns nothing
reverseTower() - Method in class Tower
name: reverseTower use nothing Order tower from smallest to largest (menor a mayor) returns nothing

S

setCanvasSize(int, int) - Static method in class Rectangle
Set the canvas size (call this before making visible)

Set the foreground colour of the Canvas.

Set the position of the cup

Set the position of the lid

Set the position of the rectangle
setVisible(boolean) - Method in class Canvas
Set the canvas visibility and brings canvas to the front of screen when made visible.
slowMoveHorizontal(int) - Method in class Rectangle
Slowly move the rectangle horizontally.
slowMoveVertical(int) - Method in class Rectangle
Slowly move the rectangle vertically.
